mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy a Snort IPS inline on the LAN side between the FortiGate and the internal switch so the appliance can automatically detect and block ICMP flood and anomalous traffic patterns.

Enable and configure FortiGate DoS/ICMP protection and rate-limiting on the firewall (create DoS sensors/thresholds on the relevant WAN and LAN interfaces) to throttle and drop abusive ICMP traffic at the network edge.

args.command:
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "MITIGATE_BLOCK_ICMP_LAN_TO_WAN"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 0
set name "ICMP_RATE_LIMIT"
set interface "port1"
set status enable
set service "PING"
set dos-log enable
set src-addr "all"
set dst-addr "all"
set action block
set block-duration 60
set audit 1
set anomaly {"icmp":200}
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set name "ICMP_RATE_LIMIT"
set interface "port1"
set status enable
set service "PING"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action block
set block-duration 60
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set nat enable
next
edit 2
set name "MITIGATE_BLOCK_ICMP_LAN_TO_WAN"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "MITIGATE_BLOCK_ICMP_LAN_TO_WAN_TOP"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end
